violations.text: Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The door to the outside, located at the side of the building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
